scale.description: Confirmed by official government records, court filings, or verified public databases.
scale.label: Verified Public Record

scale.description: Published by a government agency in an official capacity.
scale.label: Official Statement

scale.description: Preserved journalism or public records from a credible outlet.
scale.label: Archived Reporting

scale.description: Appears in a declassified government document via FOIA or mandatory review.
scale.label: Declassified Mention

scale.description: First-person testimony from a named or credible witness.
scale.label: Witness Account

scale.description: Reported by media but not independently verified by this wiki.
scale.label: Media Claim

scale.description: Community tradition, legend, or oral account without documentation.
scale.label: Folklore / Oral History

scale.description: Conflicting evidence or credible counter-claims exist.
scale.label: Disputed

scale.description: Demonstrated to be false, fabricated, or a deliberate hoax.
scale.label: Hoax / Debunked

scale.description: Insufficient evidence to confirm or deny. Open question.
scale.label: Unresolved
